title: NeoCreate
description: Yet another Create focused modpack; Optimization, QOL, Terrain changes.
body:
A modpack based around Create. Various QOL mods, optimization mods, and terrain mods are in the modpack.

The aim of this modpack is to supplement Create gameplay while still adding terrain enhancements to Vanilla, allowing for the user to have an enhanced Create experience.

Terralith adds a multitude of new biomes, while also improving existing vanilla biomes and sticking with vanilla resources and blocks.

Many of vanilla's original pain points have been resolved while still keeping the feel of vanilla, such as the Carry On mod allowing you to pick up and move chests and animals.

Create is the only mod in this pack that adds new blocks and items (as of 1.0), allowing for the pack to be purely focused on Create while also providing an pre-customized out of the box experience, with a minimap, hunger saturation indicators, JEI/item displays, and the ability to install shaders. The goal of this pack is to simplify that experience, coming with many essential client side mods already preloaded.
